title: What we know on Day 30 of the war with Iran: Israel prepared for ‘multi-front war’ and more US troops arrive in the region | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

As the conflict in the Middle East enters its second month, all the major parties are doubling down on their positions, seemingly weighing the option of further escalation.

Israel said it is prepared for a “multi-front war,” Iran’s parliament speaker said the country’s forces are “waiting” for a US ground invasion, while more US troops arrived in the region.

Here’s the latest.

See Full Web Article
